must_do.full_text:
I can't believe this is real

I have GLM 5.2 running 100% locally on my Mac Studio. 2 bit quant.

The results I'm getting are better than Opus 4.8

It's now powering my Hermes Agent and Codex. 100% free, local, private super intelligence on my desk

I also have it in a loop https://t.co/44MMm1DNbE
must_do.summary: GLM 5.2模型在Mac Studio本地运行2bit量化，性能超越Opus 4.8，完全免费私密。展示开源大模型本地部署的可行性和性能突破。
angles: GLM 5.2本地运行超越Opus 4.8
Mac Studio上的免费超级智能
开源模型终于能打闭源旗舰

must_do.full_text:
Introducing Brain in Computer.

Brain is a continuously learning memory system. Every task on Computer plugs into a context graph built by Brain.

It makes Computer more stateful with every run.

Available as a research preview for all Perplexity Max subscribers. https://t.co/Dw4Q7Izmqs
must_do.summary: Perplexity推出Brain in Computer功能，一个持续学习的记忆系统，为Computer增加状态性。现作为研究预览版向Perplexity Max订阅者开放。
angles: Perplexity Brain：AI终于有了持续记忆
Computer新能力｜每次运行都更聪明的AI助手
持续学习的AI记忆系统，Perplexity如何做到

must_do.full_text:
Tulsi Gabbard just released four PDFs that, she says, show that Fauci funded the very research that created COVID-19.

I fed Claude the four PDFs. 🧵 It uncovered some never-yet-revealed blockbusters.

(The following is all Claude—I am just quoting it.)

1. The IC Inspector
must_do.summary: Larry Sanger用Claude分析Tulsi Gabbard发布的四份PDF，声称发现COVID-19起源的新证据。涉及政治敏感话题和Claude能力展示的混合。
angles: Claude深度分析：Tulsi四份PDF里的COVID真相
Larry Sanger用AI挖掘被忽视的历史文件
AI文档分析能力首次破解政治谜团

Someone on Reddit built a WoW private server with 1,800 bots and AI chat via the DeepSeek API.

Dead Internet Theory, but playable.

An MMORPG with no real players, yet somehow it still feels human. https://t.co/uFD0AHiquc

死亡互联网理论成真：无真人的MMORPG
DeepSeek API搭建的AI游戏世界有多真实

must_do.full_text:
GLM 5.2 on Ollama's cloud just doubled GPU capacity to handle the volume of usage! 

This is all US based, and running on NVIDIA B300 Blackwell GPUs. We believe privacy matters! 

Let's go open models! ❤️

must_do.full_text:
As AI takes on longer, higher-stakes tasks, we want models to carry beneficial and safe behavior into new domains beyond their training—and maintain it under pressure.

That’s the idea behind our new research on training models to be broadly and persistently beneficial.
must_do.summary: OpenAI发布新研究：训练AI模型在新领域保持安全有益行为，即使在压力下也能维持。探索AI长期高风险任务的可靠性。
angles: OpenAI新研究：让AI在压力下也能保持安全
AGI时代的可靠性突破：跨域行为迁移
从训练到部署：AI安全性的终极考验

must_do.full_text:
Earlier today, ~3% of Claude Code Max and Pro users hit a bug that showed an incorrect weekly usage limit, and in some cases blocked them from sending messages. 

This is fixed, and we're resetting 5-hour and weekly limits for everyone affected. Apologies for the disruption.
